query: ALTER TABLE insurer_tenants ADD COLUMN primary_currency VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'USD'; ALTER TABLE insurer_tenants ADD COLUMN primary_currency_symbol VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT '$'; ALTER TABLE insurer_tenants ADD COLUMN secondary_currency VARCHAR(3); ALTER TABLE insurer_tenants ADD COLUMN secondary_currency_symbol VARCHAR(10); ALTER TABLE insurer_tenants ADD COLUMN exchange_rate DECIMAL(10,4);
